headline: 'Trump Train Is Rolling,' Sean Duffy Says As New Union Pacific Locomotive Honoring President Hauls Key NASA Artemis Components
summary: Sean Duffy touts Union Pacific's new locomotive built to honor Donald Trump and celebrate America's 250th Fourth of July.
